Detailed Object Design.description: Generates detailed prompts for objects. Style -> Form -> Details -> Refine.

steps.goal: Define overall style based on user input.
Describe the primary shape and form.
Add specific details and materials.
Combine steps into a concise prompt.

Minimal Concatenate Test.description: Simple workflow just combining two steps.

steps.goal: Establish core concept and mood.
Define composition, lighting, camera details.
Add fine details to elements in the scene.
Combine steps into a coherent scene prompt.

Template - Concatenate Keywords.description: Adds distinct aspects (subject, style, details, composition) as keywords/phrases. Good for tag-based models (e.g., SDXL). Output order depends on step order.

steps.goal: Describe the core subject and overall mood in keywords or short phrases.
List relevant artistic styles, techniques, or visual treatments as keywords.
Add specific keywords for textures, materials, or fine details.
Provide keywords for camera angle, lighting style, and composition.

Template - Structured Concatenate.description: Adds distinct aspects (subject, style, details, composition) with labels identifying the contributing agent/step. Useful for analysis or complex prompts.

steps.goal: Describe the core subject and overall mood concisely.
Identify and describe the primary artistic style and medium.
Describe important textures, materials, and fine details.
Describe the composition, camera angle, and lighting characteristics.

Template - Refine Last (Scene Focus).description: Builds context step-by-step (Concept -> Composition -> Details) and uses the final agent to synthesize a polished prompt.

steps.goal: Establish the core scene concept, subject matter, and overall mood/atmosphere.
Based on the concept, define the composition, camera viewpoint, lens type, and primary lighting approach.
Add specific details about key elements, textures, materials, or background features mentioned in the context.
Synthesize all the information provided in the previous context steps into a single, coherent, and evocative image generation prompt. Ensure smooth integration of concept, composition, and details.

Template - Refine Last (Object Focus).description: Builds context step-by-step (Style -> Form -> Details) for an object and uses the final agent to synthesize a polished prompt.

steps.goal: Define the overall aesthetic style (e.g., Art Deco, Cyberpunk, Minimalist) and any relevant artistic medium.
Describe the primary shapes, forms, and overall structure of the object based on the defined style.
Add specific details about materials, textures, colors, surface finishes, and smaller components based on the form and style.
Synthesize all the information provided in the previous context steps (style, form, details) into a single, coherent, and detailed image generation prompt for the object.

Template - Summarize All.description: Gathers descriptions of different aspects (Concept, Style, Color, Composition) and uses a final LLM call (implicit) to synthesize them into a coherent narrative or prompt.

steps.goal: Describe the core concept, subject, and action of the scene.
Describe the main artistic style, medium, and any specific techniques visible.
Describe the overall color palette, mood evoked by the colors, and any dominant hues.
Describe the composition, camera angle, and lighting setup.

Creative - Metaphorical Vision.description: Gathers diverse sensory inputs (mood, color, texture) and reinterprets them through a dynamically chosen creative metaphor. Excellent for abstract and evocative results.

steps.goal: Describe the core subject and emotional mood of the scene.
Describe the scene's color palette and the feelings those colors evoke.
Describe the key textures, materials, and fine details present.

Creative - Hybrid Concept Factory.description: Fuses three distinct inputs—a core object, a world/style, and an abstract theme—to generate a truly novel hybrid prompt. Ideal for creating something that has never been seen before.

steps.goal: Describe a primary object or character, focusing on its form and function.
Describe an environment, world, or abstract architectural style (e.g., 'underwater city', 'digital wasteland', 'gothic art deco').
Provide a single, powerful emotional or abstract keyword that must be incorporated (e.g., 'solitude', 'growth', 'decay').

Creative - Themed Content Writer.description: Generates detailed content about a subject, then rewrites the entire prompt in a dynamically chosen literary or textual style for unique creative effects.

steps.goal: Describe the core subject, characters, and action of the scene.
Describe the composition, camera angle, and lighting of the scene.
Describe the specific materials, textures, and background details.
